name: Duolingo Language Learning Platform API
what_it_does: Duolingo language learning platform API for EdTech developers and enterprise learning teams to access Duolingo for Schools and Duolingo English Test (DET) integration capabilities — enabling learner progress tracking, classroom management, and English proficiency verification through the world's most-used language learning app with 500M+ registered users across 40+ languages. Enables AI agents to manage classroom creation for teacher-student enrollment automation, handle learner progress for language acquisition tracking automation, access streak and XP data for engagement gamification automation, retrieve course completion for language curriculum tracking automation, manage Duolingo English Test results for admissions verification automation, handle CEFR alignment for proficiency level mapping automation, access leaderboard for competitive engagement automation, retrieve language placement for adaptive learning automation, manage school reporting for institutional learning analytics automation, and integrate Duolingo with LMS, HR, and admissions platforms for language learning workflow automation.
use_cases: Tracking student language learning progress in Duolingo for Schools for classroom management automation agents
Verifying Duolingo English Test scores for university admissions workflow automation agents
Accessing learner XP and streak data for corporate language training compliance automation agents
Integrating Duolingo progress with LMS platforms for blended learning curriculum automation agents
not_for: Enterprise formal language certification programs requiring accredited assessments (Duolingo DET is supplementary, not universally accepted)
Business language training with custom content (Duolingo content is fixed curriculum, not customizable)
General consumer app customization (Duolingo's public API is limited to education/schools use cases)
best_when: An educational institution, K-12 school, or language learning platform wanting AI agents to manage Duolingo for Schools classrooms, track learner progress, or integrate Duolingo English Test verification into admissions workflows.
avoid_when: PUBLIC API IS VERY LIMITED: Duolingo's official public API is minimal; automated full platform control assumption creates missing endpoints; automated must use Duolingo for Schools integration or DET verification — not a general-purpose API. DUOLINGO FOR SCHOOLS IS EDUCATION-ONLY: The classroom management API is scoped to K-12/higher ed institutions; automated corporate training deployment assumption creates unauthorized access; automated corporate training should use Duolingo for Business (separate product). CONTENT IS NOT CUSTOMIZABLE: Duolingo's language courses are proprietary fixed content; automated custom lesson injection assumption creates no customization endpoint; automated cannot add custom vocabulary or grammar lessons. DET SCORE VERIFICATION IS SEPARATE: Duolingo English Test verification uses a separate integration from Duolingo for Schools; automated unified score+classroom assumption creates two separate integration paths; automated must implement DET Score Verification API separately.

auth.notes: Duolingo uses OAuth 2.0 for Duolingo for Schools and DET partner integrations. REST API with JSON. Pittsburgh, PA HQ. Founded 2011 by Luis von Ahn and Severin Hacker. NASDAQ:DUOL. Products: Language courses (40+ languages), Duolingo for Schools, Duolingo English Test, Duolingo for Business, Max (AI tutoring). SDKs: None public. 500M+ users. GDPR, COPPA, FERPA compliant. Free consumer app with limited official API. Competes with Babbel and Rosetta Stone.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Duolingo for Schools is free for teachers; DET verification requires institutional partnership
pricing.paid_tiers: Super Duolingo $6.99/month (consumer); Duolingo for Business enterprise pricing; DET verification via institutional agreement
pricing.notes: Pittsburgh PA. NASDAQ:DUOL. Free for schools. DET institutional partnership. GDPR, COPPA, FERPA.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; classroom and progress APIs throttled; no real-time webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: VERY LIMITED PUBLIC API: Duolingo's official API is minimal and scoped to Duolingo for Schools and DET verification; automated full platform API assumption creates missing endpoints; automated must restrict use cases to schools management and DET verification

EDUCATION-ONLY CLASSROOM API: Duolingo for Schools API requires educational institution account; automated corporate training deployment creates access denied; automated corporate use should explore Duolingo for Business (separate product and API)

CONTENT IS FIXED CURRICULUM: Duolingo language course content cannot be customized; automated custom lesson creation assumption creates no such endpoint; automated cannot inject custom vocabulary, grammar, or assessment content

COPPA COMPLIANCE FOR MINORS: Duolingo for Schools data includes minors; automated unrestricted child data handling creates COPPA violation; automated must implement age-appropriate consent and parental permission workflows

DET SCORE VERIFICATION IS PARTNER-ONLY: Duolingo English Test institutional verification requires approved partner agreement; automated self-service DET score access assumption creates unauthorized access; automated admissions integration requires DET institutional partner status
agent_readiness.security_notes: Language learning platform. GDPR, COPPA, FERPA. OAuth2. US/EU. Student and learner data including minors.

security_score_components.security_notes: Consumer/EdTech language platform. GDPR, COPPA, FERPA. OAuth2. US. Student data including children.
